metadata.description: Vibecoding with the DHH philosophy — Claude Code plugin marketplace for Rails 8 + Hotwire + Kamal shipping. Distilled from 37signals' Fizzy, Campfire, and Writebook.

plugins.name: dhh-vibecoding
plugins.description: 17 skills that make Claude Code fluent in DHH-style Rails + VPS shipping. Main: prd-writing, schema-design-flow, rails-conventions, turbo-frames, turbo-streams, stimulus-controllers, tailwind-patterns, auth-setup, active-storage, solid-suite-config, kamal-deployment, vps-basics, rails-debug-helper, mayar-payment-integration, rubyllm-patterns. Extras: vanilla-css, vps-provisioning.
